return(function(S,t,I,F,M,K,G,w,B,u,X,z,D,p,k,Z,y,a,i,v,E)D,a,w,B,X,i,Z,u,z,E,y,p,k,v=function(S,c)local t=Z(c)local I=function(I)return B(S,{I},c,t)end return I
